appShortcutName: Synology Active Backup for Business Agent
appDisplayName: Synology Active Backup for Business Agent
description:
Active Backup for Business is an all-in-one backup solution for Synology NAS, designed for streamlining and enhancing data protection in businesses' diverse IT environments.

Active Backup for Business Agent must be installed on every Windows device, Mac computer, and Linux physical server you want to protect. You can perform a set of administration, including task management and template configuration, in Active Backup for Business console.
Compatibility and Installation
1. Updated to be compatible with Active Backup for Business 3.2.0.
What's New
1. Added support for backing up systems running Linux kernel 6.14. Learn more
2. Added support for backing up and restoring physical servers running Windows Server 2025.
3. Added support for backup and restore on macOS Tahoe 26.
Fixed Issues
1. Fixed an issue where the Windows backup agent might cause abnormal increases in memory usage when running for extended periods.
2. Fixed an issue where Linux kernel upgrades might fail when the Active Backup for Business Agent is installed.
3. Fixed an issue where backups performed by the Windows backup agent might become unresponsive during snapshot creation.
4. Fixed an issue in the Linux agent installer where dependencies might be incorrectly detected, causing installation failures.
